storage.value:
Old diagram


Updated diagram

https://xd.adobe.com/view/da11392b-b666-46e7-b12c-44e30f397637-8f42/

“Revers” button should be enabled in “Preview“ mode. after clicking on the button should open window. which includes the following fields :

  1. Search bar – to search customer’s identification number (UIC) and add it to the point of delivery 

    1. Search bar should have search button 

    2. Search should be able in all the existing customers in the system

    3. System should not display deleted customers

    4. Billing group drop-down should be added after the customer fields in reverse payment form.

    5. Billing group field should be optional and should list only billing groups that belong to the selected customer (billing groups from customer linked contracts).

    6. The system should allow optional user selection from selected customer billing groups.

    7. If billing group is empty, new reversed payment should be created without billing group. If billing group is selected, new reversed payment should be created with selected billing group and backend should validate that selected billing group belongs to selected customer.

  2. Blocking for offsetting

    1. checkbox

    2. Optional

  3. Block from date

    1. Date picker

    2. Mandatory if the “Blocking for Offsetting” checkbox is selected

    3. Default Value: Current date

  4. Block to date

    1. Date picker

    2. Optional

  5. Reason

    1. Mandatory if blocking for offsetting is selected

    2. Default nomenclature

    3. Dropdown

Case 1

Case 2

Case 3

Offsetting format:

Payment

32953- 2024-09-18-7 EUR

Liability

32953- 2024-09-18-7 EUR

After reversal

Payment

32953- 2024-09-18-7 EUR (Reversed)

2953- 2024-09-18 (-7) EUR

Liability

32953- 2024-09-18-7 EUR (Reversed)

32953- 2024-09-18 (-7) EUR

Outgoing format:

OUTGOING Document of payment

Negative Payment

Receivable

Outgoing document of negative payment and receivable

Payment

Payment date and accounting period (reverse payment)

  1. Negative payment

    1. The negative payment should be created with the date of the original (reversed) payment.

    2. The negative payment should be created in the accounting period of the original (reversed) payment if it is opened; otherwise, in the current accounting period.

  2. New payment

    1. The new payment should be created with the date of the original (reversed) payment.

    2. The new payment should be created in the accounting period of the original (reversed) payment if it is opened; otherwise, in the current accounting period.

Customer feedbacks:

https://oppa-support.atlassian.net/browse/PDT-2600

https://oppa-support.atlassian.net/browse/PDT-2045
